title: Adobe Firefly Creator Offer — Subscriber Survey
description: A profiling and satisfaction survey of subscribers to Adobe's new Firefly Creator Offer paid plans (FFST/FFPO/FFPU). Covers who subscribed, why they signed up, what creative work they use Firefly for, and how satisfied they are — with a Firefly Standalone vs Multi-Plan comparison.
rationale: Recreates the ADRS subscriber-survey methodology: a ~30-question online survey compressed to 18 items, mixing multiple-choice profiling questions with open-ended motivation and satisfaction questions. Reported as scaled-qualitative, directional input given the small sample. ADRS's 7-point satisfaction scale is approximated with PRISM's 5-point Likert (closest available proxy).

questions.text: In the past 6 months, which of the following have you done on your own personal social media accounts? Select all that apply.
options: Posted my own original, edited content
Earned money or compensation from content I made
Actively tried to earn money or compensation, but did not yet

questions.text: How would you characterize your skills when it comes to creative projects?
options: Expert in 1 or more creative disciplines

questions.text: Which types of edits do you typically make when you do creative projects? Select all that apply.
Which of these creative apps do you use? Select all that apply.
options: Adobe Creative Cloud flagship apps (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere, etc.)

questions.text: Which of these AI apps do you use? Select all that apply.
options: Generative AI features inside creative apps (e.g. Generative Fill)

questions.text: How would you describe your experience using Adobe creative products?
In the past 30 days, how often did you work on creative projects using any creative app or software?
In the past 30 days, how often did you use generative AI to make new content for your creative projects (images, video, or audio)?
Why did you sign up for your Adobe Firefly Plan? Select all that apply.
options: Easy to learn and use apps
Cheaper than other Creative Cloud plans

questions.text: In your own words, why did you sign up for your Firefly plan, and what did you hope it would do for you?
questions.placeholder: What drew you to the plan...

questions.text: What specific creative projects did you get the Firefly plan to work on? Tell us whether they are professional/work projects or personal/hobby projects, and describe them.
questions.placeholder: The projects I had in mind were...

questions.text: Thinking about your overall experience with your Adobe Firefly Plan, how satisfied or dissatisfied are you?
What do you like most about your Firefly plan? What is working well for you?
What frustrates you most about your Firefly plan, or falls short of what you expected?
My Firefly plan is worth what I pay for it.
Have you used the third-party AI models (e.g. Google Gemini, Nano Banana, Flux, GPT-Image) available through your Firefly plan?
options: Yes — I tried them once or twice
No — I'm aware of them but haven't tried them
No — I didn't know they were available

questions.text: Who pays for your Adobe Firefly Plan?
